title: Birthday Celebration!
name: Darya Ashurkevich
message: Thank you everyone for the wonderful birthday wishes! 💜

title: Birthday Celebration!
name: Pavel Savinskiy
message: Celebrating another year with the team! Thank you for all the birthday love! 🎉
teamNote: Head of Design and Creative Operations

title: Welcome to the Team!
name: Roman Loboda
quote: I'm excited to join Appodeal as an AI & Automation Analyst, working directly with Pavel in the Parkland office. My background is in software engineering and startups, focused on using AI and automation to reduce manual work and make operations more efficient.

title: Welcome Aboard!
name: Shayan Manouchehri
quote: Hi everyone! I'm from Barcelona, and I've spent the last few years at Criteo. I'm really looking forward to getting started and to keep growing and learning from all of you. I'm a proud cat owner and love exploring the city!

title: Internet Security Learning Success
headline: Lunch & Learn: Internet Security 101 Delivered with Excellence
description: Our Internet Security 101 session was a standout success! Dmytrii transformed complex security topics into an engaging, story-driven presentation that made technical concepts accessible to everyone.
takeaway: Proof that great teaching makes even the most technical subjects memorable and actionable for our entire team.

title: Tech Evolution Announcement
description: We're transitioning to corporate AI accounts for ChatGPT, Claude, and Cursor to better track usage and scale best practices. Access via Okta with configured usage limits matching individual subscriptions.

title: Team Recognition
reason: Outstanding data science contributions and collaboration

title: Recognition Wave
reason: Exceptional automation engineering work and system improvements

title: Team Appreciation
reason: Senior software development excellence and mentorship

title: SDK Evolution Milestone
headline: BitMachine SDK Takes Center Stage
description: Major architectural decision confirmed: full mediation capabilities are transitioning from legacy Apodil to BitMachine SDK. This consolidation will simplify integrations and end legacy support, focusing our engineering power on next-generation solutions.

title: AI Automation Breakthrough
headline: AI Agent Ready for Production Testing
description: Our AI bot successfully passed staging tests and can now read bidders, respond to queries, and automate routine dashboard tasks like domain updates and bundle blocking. This addresses the high volume of manual publisher requests.
takeaway: From manual tasks to AI automation - we're building the future of operational efficiency.

title: Revenue Strategy Alignment
headline: Q2 2026 Financial Projections Refined
description: Leadership aligned on revenue categorization between Autoplay and RevOps clients, incorporating Chardonnay's Tricky campaigns with 2% profit margins. Clear segmentation improves forecasting accuracy while accounting for negative margin learning phases.

title: Gaming Success Story
headline: Infinite Minesweeper Hits Apple Benchmark
description: Our Infinite Minesweeper achieved 61% retention, placing it in Apple's ERA benchmark range of 151-160%. This success demonstrates our gaming division's ability to create engaging, high-retention experiences.
takeaway: Gaming turned profitable in 2025 and continues delivering benchmark-beating results.

title: Vision 2030 Progress
headline: Building Toward $50B Company Goal
description: With $100M gross profit, $20M EBITDA, and 40% YoY growth projected, we're executing on our ambitious vision: 1,500 employees, 100 studios, and every team member managing 5-10 AI agents within 3-6 months.

title: Security Excellence
headline: Fraud Prevention Success with Dynamic SDK
description: Our dynamic SDK signatures implementation dramatically reduced fraud from 22% to under 4%. This technical achievement protects revenue while maintaining user experience quality.
takeaway: Smart engineering solutions delivering measurable business impact and user protection.

title: Wellness Culture
headline: Daily Yoga Sessions Keep Team Centered
quote: Join Anna Kolyada's daily yoga sessions at 13:10 CET - available both in office and online streaming
author: Team Wellness Initiative

title: Sales Performance Win
headline: Strong Weekly Sales Momentum
description: Our sales team closed 8 deals generating $390k net revenue in a single week, demonstrating strong market demand and effective sales execution across our product portfolio.

title: Learning Community
description: Our company book club has grown to 140+ participants, fostering a culture of continuous learning and intellectual curiosity across all teams and locations.

title: Challenge Champions
headline: AI Advent Challenge Heroes
quote: 20-day marathon completed by 6 dedicated heroes who tackled every challenge
author: Development Team

title: Product Performance
headline: Solitaire v540 Delivers Major Retention Boost
description: The latest Solitaire version achieved a significant 21.67% improvement in D7 retention, showcasing the impact of data-driven product iterations and user experience optimization.
takeaway: Continuous improvement methodology paying off with measurable user engagement gains.
